description: Dolly zoom camera path preset -- simultaneous Z push forward + FOV widen (or Z pull back + FOV narrow). The Hitchcock/Spielberg vertigo effect. Dramatic but use sparingly. Defines position(t), lookAt(t), fov_start/fov_end animation, easing defaults, compatible geometries, and oversizing requirements. Addresses TC-14 (FOV animation produces useful effects).
notes: Tier 2 camera path. Medium priority. Currently a leaf node. May be deferred to post-V1.
